title: Villager Mincer
description: Have you ever wanted to eat a villager before? With this mod, now you can!
body:
Have you ever wanted to eat a villager before? With this mod, now you can!
The incredible Super Mincer allows you to eat villagers all day long!
And as a bonus, FREE EMERALDS!!!

Credit to _jx on the Japanese Unoffical Minecraft Forums for making the original mod and credit to VortexBlender for helping me out during this mod's development.

![The Super Mincer in action!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/666b390480d3f84c0a4ef0fb9ce07f61dce04fda.png)
